evidence_quotes.quote: exploitation against developers that make User Generated Content "UGC" on gaming platforms such as Roblox and Minecraft.
removing access to media that consumers have paid for.

paragraphs.text: To me, passing the Digital Fairness Act would be a powerful signal that the EU is a force for good, and I would become highly supportive of my country entering the EU if it went well. However, it could be even better. I would like it to additionally target questionable practices of removing access to media that consumers have paid for. It should also target exploitation against developers that make User Generated Content "UGC" on gaming platforms such as Roblox and Minecraft. These are often young talents that are taken advantage of by the platforms as well as the third party companies and groups that work under them.
